documentation.content: This alert fires if the P95 latency of the agent workflow rises above 120s for 5 minutes or more.

conditionThreshold.filter: resource.type = "prometheus_target" AND metric.type = "prometheus.googleapis.com/gen_ai.invoke_workflow.duration/histogram" AND (resource.labels.location = "${LOCATION}" AND resource.labels.job = "${AGENT_ID}") AND metric.labels."gen_ai.workflow.nested" != "true"
